message:
style(core): apply linting fixes and rustfmt alignment

Address clippy and rustfmt warnings across six modules:

- crash.rs: Reformat multi-line assert!() macro calls to match rustfmt's
  preferred indentation for chained method calls inside macros
- runtime_compat.rs: Fix two clippy lints — replace `_ = sleep(...)` with
  `() = sleep(...)` for explicit unit binding in select!, and replace
  `if let Some(()) = x` with `if x == Some(())` for cleaner comparison
- search_bridge.rs: Consolidate two separate runtime_compat use statements
  into a single grouped import
- web.rs: Fix closure body indentation inside .map() to align with the
  surrounding block
- mux_pool.rs: Add missing CompatRuntime import needed after runtime_compat
  migration
- storage.rs: Reformat .map(|v| ...) closures for serialization warning
  logging to match rustfmt's preferred multi-line closure style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -531,10 +531,10 @@ fn frame_to_sse(event_type: &'static str, seq: u64, frame: serde_json::Value) ->
         .inspect_err(|e| tracing::warn!(error = %e, event_type, "SSE frame serialization failed"))
         .ok()
         .map(|body| {
-        SseEvent::new(body)
-            .event_type(event_type)
-            .id(seq.to_string())
-    })
+            SseEvent::new(body)
+                .event_type(event_type)
+                .id(seq.to_string())
+        })
 }
